x_note: PROPOSAL — LLM-generated NEW critical/high properties (tools/generate-properties.py, speca#88). Each pairs a proved gasper theorem with a critical/high defect class NOT covered by CHK-15. Judged >=3.5, guards passed. REVIEW before adding to theorem_map (adding requires updating the checklist-count/shard contract tests).

properties.label: fork-choice
properties.text: Confirm every attestation counted in fork-choice weight (filter_block_tree/get_weight) has passed BLS signature verification, target-checkpoint consistency, and slot-timing eligibility checks, with no path for unvalidated attestations to affect head selection.
properties.assertion: filter_block_tree/get_weight: ∀ a in tallied_attestations, verify_bls(a) ∧ checkpoint_consistent(a) ∧ slot_eligible(a) == true

properties.label: fork-choice
properties.text: Verify attestation validation rejects and excludes from fork-choice weighting any attestation whose target checkpoint, slot, or BLS signature fails verification, or whose block root is absent from the block tree, before filter_block_tree runs.
properties.assertion: forall a: !(valid_target(a) & valid_slot(a) & root_in_tree(a) & bls_verify(a)) => a not in weighted_attestations(filter_block_tree)

properties.label: p2p-interface
properties.text: Verify every path indexing or shifting the justification-bits array (attestation processing, ancestor lookup, gossip validation, eviction) validates epoch distance against the array's fixed bound before use, rejecting out-of-range inputs instead of truncating.
properties.assertion: forall msg: epoch_diff(msg.target.epoch, current_epoch) <= BITS_LEN checked before index/shift; else reject/evict, never truncate

properties.label: p2p-interface
properties.text: Confirm each gossip/libp2p decompression path validates compressed-size and declared uncompressed-size against a fixed cap before allocating buffers, rejecting oversized/malformed frames so one peer cannot exhaust resources and stall propagation.

properties.label: beacon-chain:attestation
properties.text: Verify all writes to the fork choice store (block tree, attestation weights, checkpoints) are serialized under one lock or atomic snapshot, so concurrent attestation/block threads never observe a torn view during filter_block_tree or weight computation.
properties.assertion: store_mutations(block_tree,weights,checkpoints) lock-serialized; filter_block_tree & weight reads only see atomic, non-torn snapshots across threads
